input: Create a SunriseIllustration for the morning home screen — fog lifting over hills, amber sky, rooster silhouette
Create a FamilyDogIllustration showing Maple the golden doodle sitting in a meadow
Add a ChickenCoopIllustration — small wooden structure, nesting boxes visible through door, chickens on roost
Create a SeedlingIllustration for a spring-start widget — small pots in a tray, just sprouting
failures: PAPER_CUTOUT_STYLE: The illustration uses plain rectangles with minimal layering depth. The 'sky' rect only covers the top half (height 140 of 280), leaving the bottom half as a black void. There is no distinct ground/soil layer, no mid-ground fill, and the shapes don't create the characteristic stacked flat-color paper cutout aesthetic — it reads more like floating rectangles on a partial background.

COMPLETE_SCENE: The viewBox lower half (y=172 to y=280) is empty black void — no ground, soil, table surface, or background fill covers the full canvas. The scene is incomplete with a large unrendered region below the tray.

input: Create a WeatherIllustration for a weather widget — rolling clouds, rain drops, and a partial rainbow
failures: PAPER_CUTOUT_STYLE: The illustration uses near-white/grey ellipses for clouds and a plain sky rect, but lacks the distinct flat colored shape layers at multiple depth planes with varied palette colors typical of paper cut-out style. Cloud layers are nearly identical in color (#FFFFFF, #F0F4F8, #E8EEF4, #DFE6ED) making them visually indistinct as separate depth layers. No ground/terrain layer is present at all.

COLOR_VARIETY: The palette is almost entirely desaturated whites and light blues (#B8D4E8, #FFFFFF, #F0F4F8, #F5F9FC, #E8EEF4, #DFE6ED). Only two small rainbow arcs provide any warm color. There are no dark background values or rich foreground accent colors — the illustration lacks both the dark layer1/layer2 depth values and meaningful warm accent coverage.

COMPLETE_SCENE: The viewBox has no ground or terrain layer — the bottom half of the 240x320 canvas is mostly empty sky with only three small rain drops and partial rainbow arcs. A complete scene requires a ground or surface element filling the lower portion of the canvas.
